title: Best Actor Winner: 2026 Oscars - Deadline
text: Michael B. Jordan claimed the Best Actor Oscar for his dual role as Smoke and Stack in Warner Bros. Sinners. This marked Jordan's first career Academy Award nomination and win. He previously won at the Actor Awards two weeks prior to the Oscars ceremony. According to the coverage, he won the contentious Best Actor race and delivered a performance earning him the accolade on the film's strength. Jordan defeated four other nominees: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme), Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another), Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon), Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). The article notes that Jordan's win followed his earlier triumph at the Actor Awards, suggesting momentum throughout awards season for his Sinners performance.
